mapper.update: UPDATE iot_alarm SET org_id = #{orgId}, severity = #{severity}, status = #{status}, first_triggered_at = #{firstTriggeredAt}, last_triggered_at = #{lastTriggeredAt}, recovered_at = #{recoveredAt}, trigger_count = #{triggerCount}, evidence_json = #{evidenceJson}, last_event_id = #{lastEventId}, last_event_type = #{lastEventType}, create_user = #{createUser}, update_user = #{updateUser}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_alarm WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_alarm SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
